name: Coordination
description: Overall coordination of disaster response operations including activation of EOCC and deployment of DRRT.

tasks.title: Activate Emergency Operations Command Center (EOCC)
Establish Disaster Rapid Response Team (DRRT)
Convene first coordination meeting with all DRF leads
Establish coordination structure at regional/district level
Assign DRF leads and confirm agency mandates
Develop response action plan with timelines
Schedule regular progress review meetings

name: Information Management
description: Collection, analysis and dissemination of disaster-related information.

tasks.title: Gather and circulate initial disaster information
Establish information sharing protocols
Set up situation reporting template (SitRep)
Produce first situation report
Maintain incident tracking dashboard
Archive all response documents and data

name: Logistics & Supply Chain
description: Management of relief supplies, warehousing, transport and distribution pipelines.

tasks.title: Assess immediate relief supply requirements
Deploy pre-positioned stocks from nearest warehouse
Establish distribution points in affected areas
Coordinate transport and delivery logistics
Track inventory and stock movements
Request additional supplies if shortfall identified
Produce logistics pipeline report

name: Emergency Shelter & NFIs
description: Provision of emergency shelter, non-food items and camp coordination.

tasks.title: Assess shelter needs of displaced populations
Identify and prepare temporary shelter sites
Distribute emergency shelter materials and NFIs
Register displaced persons at shelter sites
Establish camp management committees
Monitor shelter conditions and protection concerns

name: Security & Public Order
description: Maintaining security, managing evacuations and ensuring public order in affected areas.

tasks.title: Establish security perimeter in affected area
Deploy police to maintain public order
Coordinate evacuation routes and traffic management
Protect relief supply distribution points
Monitor and report security incidents
Coordinate with military for additional security if needed

name: Health & Medical Services
description: Emergency medical care, disease surveillance and public health response.

tasks.title: Deploy medical teams to affected areas
Establish field treatment facilities
Activate disease surveillance and outbreak monitoring
Coordinate medical supply distribution
Manage dead bodies and mortuary services
Provide psychosocial support services
Produce health sector situation report

name: Search & Rescue
description: Search, rescue and evacuation operations for trapped and affected persons.

tasks.title: Deploy search and rescue teams
Identify priority search zones
Coordinate with military and volunteer teams
Establish casualty collection points
Manage evacuation of survivors
Document and report rescue operations

name: Food Security & Nutrition
description: Emergency food distribution and nutritional support for affected populations.

tasks.title: Conduct rapid food security assessment
Mobilize and distribute emergency food rations
Set up communal feeding stations if needed
Identify and support nutritionally vulnerable groups
Monitor food distribution equity and coverage
Coordinate food pipeline with logistics DRF

name: Communications
description: Emergency telecommunications and public communication management.

tasks.title: Process information through government channels
Establish emergency communication links in affected area
Activate public alert and warning systems
Deploy mobile communication units if networks down
Manage media relations and press statements
Counter misinformation and rumours
Set up community information hotline

name: Damage & Needs Assessment
description: Rapid and detailed assessment of damage and humanitarian needs.

tasks.title: DRRT field assessment of affected area
Collect initial damage data (deaths, injuries, infrastructure)
Produce rapid needs assessment report
Coordinate with sector leads for detailed assessments
Estimate economic losses and reconstruction costs
Identify priority areas for immediate intervention

name: WASH (Water, Sanitation & Hygiene)
description: Emergency water supply, sanitation facilities and hygiene promotion.

tasks.title: Assess water supply and sanitation damage
Deploy emergency water treatment and supply
Establish emergency latrines at shelter sites
Distribute hygiene kits and water purification tablets
Conduct hygiene promotion awareness campaigns
Monitor water quality at distribution points

name: Protection
description: Protection of vulnerable groups including children, women, elderly and persons with disabilities.

tasks.title: Identify and register vulnerable groups
Establish child-friendly spaces and protection mechanisms
Prevent and respond to gender-based violence
Ensure accessibility of services for persons with disabilities
Coordinate family tracing and reunification
Monitor protection concerns and report violations

name: Education in Emergencies
description: Continuation of education services and use of schools as temporary shelters.

tasks.title: Assess damage to educational facilities
Establish temporary learning spaces
Provide emergency education materials
Deploy emergency education teachers
Coordinate school-as-shelter protocols
Plan for school reopening and recovery

name: Environment
description: Environmental impact assessment and management of environmental hazards.

tasks.title: Assess environmental impact of disaster
Monitor hazardous material spills or contamination
Coordinate waste management in affected areas
Prevent secondary environmental hazards
Assess impact on ecosystems and natural resources
Produce environmental impact report

name: Early Recovery
description: Transition from response to recovery including livelihoods restoration and infrastructure rehabilitation.

tasks.title: Develop early recovery framework and priorities
Assess livelihood impacts and recovery needs
Initiate emergency employment and cash-for-work
Begin critical infrastructure rehabilitation
Support restoration of government services
Document lessons learned for future preparedness
Coordinate transition to long-term recovery programs
